steps.name: review-pack-contract-renderer
steps.summary: Added kifrs/workflows/kifrs1109/review_pack.py plus tests/test_1109_review_pack.py. FR1 composes existing 1109 runner, review memo, and initial journal entry into a F-ACC review pack without changing classification logic. Fixture result: 6 automated packs and 4 needs_human_review packs. Verification passed: 1109 workflow/regression/review-pack tests plus 1116 review-pack regression.
